landing_hero_title: Run smarter with your personal AI coach
landing_hero_subtitle: Track every run, get personalized training plans, and reach your goals with an AI coach that understands you.
landing_cta_support: Try every feature free without limits:
landing_feature_ai_desc: Chat for advice, auto-generated training plans, and deep run analysis.
landing_feature_tracking_desc: Pace, heart rate and elevation with synced interactive charts.
landing_feature_community_desc: Leaderboards, badges and running partner matching.
landing_footer: Built with care for the running community.
logout_confirm: Are you sure you want to logout from Runny AI?
email_not_confirmed: Your email has not been confirmed yet.
password_requirements_error: Your password does not meet the requirements below.
reset_password_hint: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
reset_email_sent: Password reset email sent. Please check your inbox.
enter_email_first: Please enter your email address first.
confirmation_resent: Confirmation email sent. Please check your inbox.
password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters.
password_updated: Password updated. You can now use your new password.
dashboard_settings_hint: Toggle and drag to arrange the sections.
no_screen_settings: This screen has no configuration options yet.
today_no_workout: No workout scheduled for today. Take a rest or go for an easy run!
location_needed_msg: We need your location to provide accurate weather and air quality information.
weather_location_placeholder: Weather and air quality will appear here.
weather_location_permission_hint: Use the button below if you want to see information for your current location.
microphone_permission_hint: Use the button to grant microphone access when you want to ask by voice.
camera_permission_hint: Use the button to grant camera access when you want to take a food photo for AI recognition.
nutrition_goal_description: Set your daily food intake and macro targets. Running calories are tracked separately.
nutrition_weight_missing: Update your weight in the profile to get a more useful suggestion.
macro_target_helper: Use grams to set the protein, carbs, and fat you want to fuel with.
nutrition_goal_invalid: Enter calories and all three macros greater than 0.
nutrition_goal_save_failed: Could not save the target. Please try again.
food_edit_invalid: Enter a food name, unit, and valid nutrition values.
food_entry_required: Please enter a food name and a valid calorie value.
chat_suggestion_1: What workout should I run today?
chat_suggestion_3: Should I improve pace or heart rate first?
chat_suggestion_4: Suggest a training schedule for the next 7 days
chat_suggestion_5: What should I keep in mind to avoid injury?
chat_suggestion_6: What is VO2 Max and how can I improve it?
chat_suggestion_7: What is the optimal running cadence?
chat_suggestion_8: How should I breathe while running to avoid losing energy?
chat_suggestion_9: How can I run for endurance without getting shin splints?
chat_suggestion_10: What is the MAF (low heart rate) running method?
chat_suggestion_11: How should a beginner choose running shoes?
chat_suggestion_12: What is the difference between normal muscle soreness and an injury?
chat_suggestion_13: How do I determine my heart rate zones for training?
chat_suggestion_14: Is it better to run in the morning or in the evening?
chat_suggestion_15: How should a beginner combine walking and running?
chat_suggestion_16: Do I need to warm up and stretch before/after running?
ai_disabled_no_key: AI Coach is disabled because no Gemini API key is configured.
ai_coach_long_wait_notice: The AI assistant is taking a little longer to reply. You can use other features and return later.
ai_keeping_pace: AI-powered guidance keeping you on pace.
ai_prompt_context: I'm asking about my workout: %s km, %s mins, avg HR %s bpm, elevation %s m, info: %s. Question: %s
coach_settings_desc: Name your coach and choose the coaching style used in AI Coach chat replies.
coach_name_invalid: Coach name must be 1 to 24 characters.
coach_persona_calm_desc: Gentle, clear, and suitable for beginners or recovery-focused days.
coach_persona_disciplined_desc: Direct, goal-focused, and keeps you accountable.
coach_persona_energetic_desc: Positive and motivating when you need extra energy to get moving.
coach_persona_scientific_desc: Prioritizes pace, heart rate, training load, and recovery data.
coach_persona_concise_desc: Short, practical answers with clear action checklists.
coach_discuss_prompt: I want to discuss the suggested changes for "%s":
already_have_account: Already have an account? Log In
email_already_registered: This email is already registered. Please log in instead.
disposable_email_not_allowed: Disposable / temporary emails are not supported. Please use a real email.
invalid_email: Invalid email. Please check and try again.
no_history: No training plans in history yet.
abandon_plan_confirm: Are you sure you want to abandon the current training plan? It will be moved to History.
plan_completed_desc: All workouts are done. Ready for your next challenge?
warm_up_prompt: Suggest a suitable warm-up for my upcoming workout "%s" (%s km).
create_plan_subtitle: Enter your goal and timeframe. The AI Coach will analyze your body metrics and recent workouts to build a tailored plan.
let_ai_decide_end: Let AI choose the end date
let_ai_decide_end_desc: The AI will pick a sensible plan length for your goal.
plan_ai_context_note: The AI personalizes your plan using your body metrics and 5 most recent activities.
plan_generation_started: AI is creating a draft plan. You can leave this screen and return to review it before activation.
plan_generating_title: The AI is building your plan
plan_generating_desc: This may take a moment. You can leave and come back later, or tap refresh to check.
plan_failed_desc: Something went wrong while creating your plan. Please try again.
delete_activity_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this activity? This action cannot be undone.
delete_history_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the chat history? This cannot be undone.
feature_in_development_desc: Strava connection is coming soon. For now you can import activities from GPX/FIT/TCX files via the add-activity button.
feature_coming_soon_body: This feature is still being developed. Please enter your email to sign up/log in!
aqi_warning_content: Data is for reference only, captured at the nearest station at the time of sampling. It does not 100% reflect the actual air quality at all locations of the running route.
multi_file_hint: You can select multiple files at once.
import_help_strava: Strava: open an activity on the web → "..." menu → Export GPX.
import_help_garmin: Garmin Connect: open an activity → gear icon ⚙ → Export to GPX/TCX.
import_help_generic: COROS / Suunto / Polar...: export GPX/TCX/FIT from the brand app, then upload here.
import_from_screenshot: Import a workout from a screenshot
screenshot_import_hint: Upload an activity result screenshot from Strava, Garmin, COROS or another running app. AI will read distance, duration, heart rate and elevation when visible. You can edit the result before importing.
analyzing_screenshot: AI is reading the workout image...
screenshot_preview_ready: Scan complete. Review and edit the result if needed before importing.
screenshot_import_failed: Unable to import an activity from this image.
manual_entry_hint: No file? Enter your run details below.
manual_validation_error: Please enter a valid distance and duration greater than 0.
duplicate_activity_error: An activity already exists at this start time.
invalid_weight_height: Please enter valid weight and height
invalid_metrics_desc: Please enter your body metrics within the reasonable ranges below:
leaderboard_empty_community: Be the first to share your running journey.
leaderboard_your_rank: You are ranked #%s in the community.
leaderboard_first_runner: You are the first runner on the leaderboard.
leaderboard_complete_activity: Complete an activity to enter the leaderboard.
leaderboard_privacy_note: Only your display name, total distance, and activity count are shared. Pro gets a badge, not a ranking advantage.
logout_confirm_short: Are you sure you want to logout?
max_hr_tooltip: Max heart rate is the highest beats per minute you can reach during very hard effort. If you have not measured it directly, estimate it as 220 minus your age, or use a fitness test/sports watch for a better value.
goal_suggestions_empty: No suitable suggestions were created. Please try again.
no_account_signup: Don't have an account? Sign Up
no_activities_yet: No activities recorded yet. Get active today!
recent_activities_empty_before_icon: You can add a new running activity by tapping the
recent_activities_empty_after_icon: icon in the top-right corner. Activities can be used to confirm workouts in your training plan.
recent_activities_empty_semantics: No activities yet. Tap the add-activity icon in the top-right corner to add a running activity and confirm a workout.
no_plan_desc: Let's create a personalized plan with our AI Coach!
no_suggestions_found: No suggestions found at this moment
oauth_error: Social login failed. Please try again.
onboarding_info_required: Please enter weight and height to continue.
onboarding_metrics_desc: Let's gather some basic metrics to personalize your experience.
optimize_plan_tooltip: Optimize plan with AI based on your recent performance
adjust_need_workout: Complete at least one workout so the AI Coach can fine-tune your plan based on your metrics.
adjust_no_change: The AI Coach found your current plan is on track — no changes needed.
partner_suggestions_desc: Runners with similar pace or nearby location
ai_insight_loading: AI Coach is analyzing your recent activities...
plan_created_assistant: I created a draft training plan. Open the Training Plan tab to review the full schedule and activate it.
training_calendar_no_workout_for_day: There is no scheduled workout on this day.
signup_success: Sign up successful! Please check your email to verify your account.
confirm_email_desc: We sent a confirmation email to %s. Please open your inbox and tap the confirmation link before logging in.
supported_formats: Supports GPX, FIT and TCX formats from your sports device
training_goal_desc: What do you want to achieve with Runny AI?
no_data_range: No activities recorded in this period
shoe_replace_warning: ⚠️ This shoe has run over 500km! Consider replacing it to avoid injuries.
vo2max_progress_msg: Your running performance corresponds to an estimated VO2 Max of %s.
reschedule_following_description: This changes the date by %s day(s). Would you like to move all scheduled workouts after it by the same amount?
add_activity_option_skip_rest_desc: Mark this workout as rest without creating a fake run activity
weather_location_error: Unable to get your current location. Please enable location services or check browser permissions.
weather_server_error: Weather service is temporarily unavailable. Please check the server status and try again.
ai_photo_hint: Take a photo of your food and AI scans it automatically
ai_suggestions_loading: AI is calculating optimal calories and nutrition...
ai_suggestions_error: Unable to load suggestions. Please check your connection or API key.
food_image_upload_error: Unable to upload the image. Please try again.
food_camera_error: Unable to open the camera. Please upload an image from your library.
food_image_required: Please choose or take a photo of your food.
trial_reminder_message: You have %s days left in your free trial. Upgrade now to keep full access to the AI assistant, training plans and food recognition when it ends.
paywall_message: This feature is for paid plans. Upgrade to unlock the full AI assistant, training plan generation and food recognition.
payment_success: Payment successful! Your benefits are now active.
choose_subscription: Choose the plan that fits you
subscription_pitch: Upgrade to unlock the full AI Coach and advanced running analytics.
empty_weight_logs: No data yet. Log your first weight entry!
weight_goal_empty_desc: Set a goal to track your progress.
landing_slogan: Train smarter with an AI assistant
landing_description: An AI-integrated running platform that helps you manage training more effectively while delivering useful personalized plans and advice.
landing_mockup_next: Next: 35 min easy run in Zone 2.
landing_feature_ai_bullet_1: Personal coaching chat and run analysis.
landing_feature_ai_bullet_2: Adaptive plans based on goals and fitness.
landing_feature_tracking_bullet_1: Distance, pace, time, elevation, and heart rate.
landing_feature_tracking_bullet_2: Activity history, charts, and route maps.
landing_feature_social_bullet_2: Partner matching by pace or area.
landing_features_desc: Runny AI brings coaching, tracking, motivation, and health data into one clean experience.
landing_value_desc: Turn running data into practical next steps for every week of training.
landing_value_personal_desc: Plans adapt to your goal, metrics, and recent runs.
landing_value_performance_desc: Insights help balance pace, load, and progress.
landing_value_motivation_desc: Achievements and community keep momentum visible.
landing_value_platform_desc: Workout, health, nutrition, weather, Strava, and AI in one place.
landing_value_statement: Runny AI gives runners a clear next step before training, after each run, and during long-term progress.
landing_how_desc: A simple coaching loop from goal setup to measurable progress.
landing_step_1_desc: Choose your target distance, habit, or race plan.
landing_step_2_desc: Runny AI reads metrics, history, pace, and recovery context.
landing_step_3_desc: AI suggests workouts and adjustments that fit your timeline.
landing_step_4_desc: Track runs, review insights, and keep momentum.
landing_tech_desc: Built with Flutter, Supabase, PostgreSQL, AI integrations, Strava, and weather services.
landing_footer_desc: Runny AI combines coaching, analytics, motivation, and health data for runners.
landing_footer_follow_dev: Follow or contribute to the development at:
landing_footer_copyright: Copyright 2026 Runny AI. Built with care for the running community.
manual_workout_subtitle: Plan a workout yourself and keep it in the same training schedule.
manual_workout_notes_hint: Add your own cues, route, or reminders...
manual_workout_number_invalid: Please enter a valid non-negative number.
manual_workout_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this personal schedule? This action cannot be undone.
manual_workout_schema_missing: The database has not been updated for manual workouts yet. Please run the latest Supabase migration, then try again.
readiness_ready: Your body is ready for the planned workout.
readiness_caution: Consider reducing intensity and listen to your body.
readiness_low: Training load or recovery signs suggest prioritising rest.
readiness_rest: Rest and monitor symptoms before running again.
readiness_low_confidence: Add RPE for at least 3 workouts for a reliable load assessment.
readiness_pain_warning: You reported unusual pain. Stop if it worsens or persists and seek appropriate medical advice.
pain_flag_hint: Runny will not suggest AI schedule changes while this flag is on.
rpe_hint: RPE 1–10: your perceived effort for this run.
plan_constraints_hint: For example: unavailable Wednesday, mild knee pain, more time on weekends...
plan_goal_with_preferences:
Goal: %s
Available sessions per week: %s
Preferred time: %s
Constraints/notes: %s
plan_draft_desc: Review the goal, workload and each workout below. Your current plan stays active until you activate this draft.
plan_draft_activate_confirm: Activate this draft and move the current active plan to history?
plan_draft_activated: The new training plan is active.
plan_draft_discard_confirm: Discard this draft and return to your current plan?
recording_guide_intro: Runny does not track GPS directly yet. Use Strava or a smart watch, then return to attach the result to this workout.
recording_guide_step_record_desc: Open Strava or the running mode on Garmin, Apple Watch, COROS, Polar, or another watch and start recording as you run.
recording_guide_step_sync_desc: Save the run on your device. If your watch is connected to Strava, wait for the activity to appear there, then return to Runny.
recording_guide_step_link_desc: Tap “Finished recording – find activity”. Runny prioritises the closest match by date, distance and duration for your confirmation.
recording_guide_import_activity: Upload a file/image or enter manually
confirm_activity_link_desc: Attach the %s km activity completed in %s minutes to “%s”?
skip_workout_confirm_desc: The workout will be marked as skipped and will not count as a run activity.
